prompt: A die-cut vinyl sticker design on a plain neutral background, isolated with a clean white die-cut border and soft drop shadow, studio product look. The orange AITX open-arms mark rendered large and bold in AITX orange #ff4201, holding a small heart shape in NVIDIA green #76b900 between its open arms. Below the mark, short handwritten-style black text reads exactly: 'it has open arms'. Flat vector style, thick clean outlines, glossy vinyl finish, high contrast, warm paper white accents. Simple, joyful, premium sticker aesthetic.
